articles.title: SBI Mutual Fund trims stake in Ather Energy to 5% after partial profit booking. Details here
articles.excerpt: SBI Mutual Fund has trimmed its stake to 5% in Ather Energy through partial profit booking. The fund house has sold 6,16,733 shares, representing 0.1565% of the paid-up share capital of Ather Energy.
articles.summary: SBI Mutual Fund has trimmed its stake to 5% in Ather Energy through partial profit booking. The fund house has sold 6,16,733 shares, representing 0.1565% of the paid-up share capital of Ather Energy.

articles.title: Newly-listed SME stock DSM Fresh Foods jumps over 30% in 2 days after reporting a 58% YoY jump in Q1 revenue
articles.excerpt: SME stock DSM Fresh Foods surged nearly 32% in just two consecutive sessions, defying weak market sentiment, after the company reported a 58% year-on-year (YoY) jump in its revenue to ₹74 crore for Q1FY27.
articles.summary: SME stock DSM Fresh Foods surged nearly 32% in just two consecutive sessions, defying weak market sentiment, after the company reported a 58% year-on-year (YoY) jump in its revenue to ₹74 crore for Q1FY27.
